Mental Game, Part 2
Bonus: Operation Quick Start
How I keep my mental game intact
• Mental game (inner game) is the most important
thing for success as an entrepreneur
• It’s not the external factors
• Your competitors
• The market
• The economy
It’s what’s happening inside your head
• Staying at a high mental state
• So you can continue to create
• Continue to move forward
• Deal with setbacks
